sequence.name: policy-admin-papi-create-endorsement-sequence

payloadFactory.format: { "errors": [ { "errorCode": "UPSTREAM_ERROR", "errorMessage": "Unable to fetch policy details", "errorDescription": "Policy fetch failed or returned invalid response" } ] }

property.name: ERROR_DETAIL
property.value: Policy fetch failed or returned invalid response

property.name: ERROR_DETAIL
property.value: Endorsement SAPI call failed while creating or updating endorsement data
